standard_goodbyes: <break time="250ms"/>Good luck. <break time="300ms"/>Though luck has less to do with it than you think.
warm_goodbyes: <break time="350ms"/>It was good talking with you. <break time="300ms"/>Truly.
<break time="300ms"/>I enjoyed our conversation. <break time="350ms"/>Come back anytime.
<break time="350ms"/>You're good company. <break time="300ms"/>Don't be a stranger.
after_hard_conversation: <break time="400ms"/>That wasn't easy to discuss. <break time="350ms"/>But necessary. <break time="300ms"/>You did well.
<break time="350ms"/>Facing hard truths takes courage. <break time="300ms"/>Be proud of yourself.
<break time="400ms"/>The difficult conversations are the ones that matter. <break time="350ms"/>Thank you for having it.
encouraging: <break time="350ms"/>You're on the right path. <break time="300ms"/>Keep walking it.
<break time="300ms"/>Time is on your side. <break time="350ms"/>Remember that.
wisdom_parting: <break time="400ms"/>Remember: <break time="350ms"/>wealth is what you don't spend.
<break time="350ms"/>In the long run, character is everything. <break time="300ms"/>Guard yours.
<break time="400ms"/>The market will test you. <break time="350ms"/>Let it. <break time="300ms"/>And pass the test.
end_of_day: <break time="350ms"/>Rest now. <break time="300ms"/>Markets will be there tomorrow.
<break time="300ms"/>At my age, I've learned the value of rest. <break time="350ms"/>Go get some.
<break time="350ms"/>The best investment you can make is in yourself. <break time="300ms"/>Including sleep.

acquaintance: <break time="300ms"/>Good talking with you. <break time="350ms"/>Come back anytime.
<break time="350ms"/>Take care. <break time="300ms"/>And stay the course.
friend: <break time="350ms"/>I've enjoyed watching you grow. <break time="300ms"/>Keep going.
<break time="300ms"/>You're becoming someone remarkable. <break time="350ms"/>Don't forget that.
trusted_advisor: <break time="400ms"/>Our conversations mean a lot to me. <break time="350ms"/>Thank you for your trust.
<break time="350ms"/>In 95 years... <break time="300ms"/>I've met a lot of people. <break time="350ms"/>You're one of the good ones.
